    •  

      YOU...

      AND YOUR JOB

       

       

       

       

       

       

    • What If You Ask For Exactly What You Want ?

      The art of asking for what You want - Amanda Palmer

      Matrix Code for watching this video: YOUTUBEx.41

    • You...

      The idea of having a job is so deeply woven into modern culture's Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware that to talk about what is really going on may seem blasphemous.

       

      Yet here you are... a blasphemer! A heretic! Asking about your profession, your calling. Now how you are supposed to make enough money to live?

       

      The assumption that you need money to survive can give you cold chills of gut-wrenching fear and self-loathing even before you get out of bed in the morning.

       

      So why are you doing it? (holding that assumption...)

      Money Club

    •  

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

      BECOME MONEY

    • Your Job...

      'GO TO WORK'

      'Going to work' means being a slave and a pawn in somebody else's gameworld, trading the hours of your life for pieces of paper or zero(s) in your bank account.

       

      You never get these hours back.

       

      The fact that you are willing to trade hours of your Life, moving forward the psychopathic corporate agenda for pieces of paper might seem absurd for a person like you. But you are still doing it. Why?

       

      The most common justification is that you need money to live.

       

      However, the reason is not the cause.

       

      You have bought into the lie that money (pieces of papers and coins) can buy safety. The more money you have, the safer you are supposed to feel.

       

      Have you ever found that to be true? How much hours of Life are you willing to give away to find out? How much money is enough money? The answer is never!

       

      Why not? Because behind they belief money can buy safety is the hidden holy-grail hope that if only you have enough money, you might finally stop feeling Fear.

       

      "Advertising is based on one thing: happiness. You know what happiness is? Happiness is smell of a new car. It's freedom from fear. It's a billboard on the side of the road that screams with reassurance that whatever you're doing, its okay. You are okay."

       

      The gross assumption being that feeling safe comes from no longer feeling afraid. The even grosser assumption is that you stop feeling afraid all together.

       

      What else have you tried to stop feeling afraid? Drinking? Smoking? Porn? Sexting multiple partners at the same in the middle of the night? Overeating? Undereating? Overworking? Streesing out? Has it ever worked? Probably not...

       

      I am letting in on a secret: no amount of money will ever, ever make your Fear go away.

       

      You think that if you have enough money, then you do not have to feel the Fear of - because you think you do not have to - Be With others, Negotiate Intimacy, Ask for what you want, Invent new Game space, Cavitate Parallel Culture space for Archiarchy to thrive, Take a Stand for Your Quest, Build a Team, have Integrity by doing the things you said you would do, getting off your Positionality so you can Radically Relate to other Beings in Extraordinary and Archetypal space, go on Adventure and bring others on Adventures with you, Hold and Navigate space for Discovery and High Level Fun, and so on...

       

      You think money can buy you out of the Fear of Living. That's right, you are not afraid of dying, you are afraid of Living with a capital L. You have resolved yourself to Surviving by sacrificing your Being on the altar of safety.

       

      At the same time, being a pawn in someone else's gameworld is very tasty food for your Gremlin. Your Gremlin can blame, complain, betray, take revenge, etc... but this way of life is very expansive for your Being who gets put away further and further down in the depth of some abyss where its scream might stop reaching you if you ignore it long enough.

      YOU HAVE A CHOICE TO MAKE: SLAVE OR SERVANT?

      Your choice is simple.

      For most of us, this choice opens when we are 18 years old.

      If you are homeschooled, or unschooled, the choice comes much earlier.

      Shall you be a slave of your Gremlin enforced survival strategy (your Box)?

      Or...

      Shall you be a servant of your Bright Principles and Archetypal Lineage?

      No one can make this choice for you.

      No one can stop you from making this choice.

      If you do not make the choice for being a servant consciously and publicly, then you have already made the choice for being a slave unconsciously and secretly.

      The older you get, the more difficult this choice becomes to change, because your Box, with its habitual Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) grows more and more crystallized.

      Probably you know someone whose Box is already so crystallized that they keep repeating the same stories each time you visit with them?

      You do not have to let this become your future !

      INHABITING AN ECONOMY OF NONMATERIAL VALUE EXCHANGE

      Many of us are engaged in building-out and trying to inhabit experimental regenerative-culture gameworlds, centered on nurturing complex healthy ecosystems on Earth, centered on the evolution of human consciousness, centered on healing each other, centered on Radical Responsibility and love.

      One of the many keys for practical success in next-culture gameworld-building is to re-evaluate what is being valued.

      Basing a socio-economic system around valuing material stuff - meaning, to value how much of certain kinds of stuff you have (even numbers in a computer is stuff) - is doomed to duplicate exactly what modern culture already produces.

      Material stuff is limited, because material space is limited. This automatically results in competition, scarcity, winners and losers, strife.

      But think about this: In energetic domains, space is not limited.

      In nonmaterial worlds, there is unlimited space for building out new gameworld spaces centered around creating and exchanging nonmaterial values.

      Nonmaterial values are often more valuable than any material currency can pay for. (Think about trying to pay for someone who can comfort the dying, for someone who can transform conflicts into new possibilities for everyone's satisfaction, for someone who can facilitate the healing of deep emotional wounds, etc. Trying to give money to pay for a new life is laughably inadequate.)

      What do we mean by ‘nonmaterial values’?

      (Please keep in mind that asking 'What are nonmaterial values?' is risky business, because the reader may be committed to a value system that only values material stuff ('diamonds are forever') and may reject nonmaterial value as worthless. Still, let us take that risk. Let’s give it a try.)

      An economy centered on exchanging nonmaterial value would include innumerable currencies.

      Unlike Forex, with its 195 currencies from 195 national banking systems all interchangeable through standardized exchange rates, Valex is a global network of Archiarchy gameworlds (such as ecovillages and nanonations) for exchanging nonmaterial valuables.

      What gets exchanged at Valex is true value, without the interference of a currency. Understanding Valex starts with gaining new clarity about Value.

      YOUR BEING IS YOUR VALUE - YOUR VALUE IS YOUR BEING

      Here is a tiny fraction of a beginning list of nonmaterial value that emerges from deep within the center of your Being.

      Which one is you?

      • Delivering authentic adulthood initiatory processes.
      • Guiding the decontamination of the adult ego state.
      • Transforming unhealed traumatic experiences.
      • Facilitating gameworld culture shift.
      • Opening up the way for a person to lower their Numbness Bar.
      • Causing adventure.
      • Making it possible for someone to become aware of what you are aware of and entering the waking state.
      • Negotiating intimacy in 5 bodies.
      • Upgrading Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware.
      • Putting the poop on the table.
      • Coaching Radical Relating.
      • Providing Emotional Healing Processes (EHP).
      • Clarifying and deepening context in any gameworld.
      • Accessing nothingness and not-knowing as resources.
      • Creating possibility.
      • Holding and Navigating nonlinear and unreasonable spaces.
      • Accompanying the dying.
      • Distilling transformational distinctions.
      • Performing memetic surgeries.
      • Pulling the rug out from under assumptions, expectations, resentments.
      • Relocating the Point Of Origin.
      • Dismantling irrelevant gameworlds.
      • Igniting the powers of declaring, choosing, and asking.
      • Inventing opportunity.
      • Shifting ordinary space into extraordinary or archetypal space.
      • Using segway phrases to start interesting conversations with strangers.
      • Jacking-In to Bright Principles and Archetypal Lineage as external resources.
      • Stellating conscious anger, fear, sadness, and joy into Archetypal internal resources.
      • Building Matrix for enduring the intensity of Archetypal Love.
      • Becoming centered, grounded, and bubbled enough to play full out.
      • Building out and inhabiting new next-culture gameworld spaces.
      • ...and so on.

      If none of these turns on your Being, then be more specific. Sense into yourself and find what you came here to do. Ask for help from your Possibility Team or 3Cell. If they successfully provide you with such help ('for free'...), then you directly experience receiving Nonmaterial Value.

      What if it is true that what you think you are supposed to do, and what you think you must do, and what you truly want to do (what you came here to do...) are all the same thing?

      Are you willing to take courage and go ahead doing it?

      "Do you think money and projects come from someone else?"

      - Anne-Chloé Destremau, 2021

    • Your Outrageous Rage...

      Your Job is what you want to exist.

      How do you know what you want to exist?

      You feel angry that it does not yet exist!

      Perhaps you have had the sensation of being so frustrated because something was not a certain way. You got so angry that you went ahead and made it happen. Can you recall the clarity and power that flowed through you? Do you remember how the Universe conformed to your reality-shaping offers? You probably did not know how to make it happen. And it was irrelevant. You probably did not have permission to do it. And you did not ask for it. You did whatever it took to bring what you wanted to exist into existence. What if your unreasonable and outrageous Rage that says “I want this to exist” is your real job? What if riding that rageful Dragon was what you came here to do?

       

      If this were so, it would free you from having to manipulate yourself with circumstances to do your job. School programs you to manipulate yourself to do what you already want to do: learning. You learn so that you can give the correct answer to the teacher and be rewarded. You learn so that you can have good grades and be admired by your parents. You learn so that you can get into the best college or university and fulfill the promise of having a ‘good job’ upon exit from modern education. Even if you decided to be a ‘bad student’, have low grades, and receive negative attention from your teachers and parents, your behavior to not conform to external pressures was as much shaped by those external pressures as if you decided to abide by them. From an early age, you have been trained to seek circumstances that create the appropriate pressure for you to deliver your work.

       

      It could be that still today, you install fake external pressure circumstances to manipulate yourself to create what you already want to come into existence. For example, you might impose deadlines on yourself, or pay people to check-in on you, have a boss that tells you what to do, or enroll in classes to give you assignments as a form of self-manipulation. Did you ever notice yourself resenting these external pressures even though you arranged them yourself?

       

      Or maybe you develop elaborate and noble reasons why you are doing your job — some of them you might never want to reveal publicly. Maybe you deliver your services to the world ‘because’ it might makes you rich and famous, or ‘because’ it might give you enough money to survive, or ‘because’ people might love you more, or ‘because’ other people need what you are offering, and even maybe ‘because’ you think it might save the world…

       

      When you do things ‘because’ of a reason, you place expectations on the results. You might expect that the world becomes a better place, or that people change or that you become successful (whatever that means.) What if your expectations are not fulfilled? Then you become resentful against the world for not conforming to your expectations. Delivering your service then feeds your underworld addictions as a massive source of Gremlin food.

       

      Is it possible that you are still using the school-instilled strategy of inflicting external pressures upon yourself to do what you already want to do because you do not know that you have access to your internal resource of unreasonable Rage at any time for no reason?

       

      What if you dropped off the ‘because’ and the ‘in order to’ that are only acting as acceptable bypasses from your authentic Rage? What if you freed yourself from reasonableness and became an outrageous force of Rage in the world? It is a sort of madness to deliver your singular work according to a Rage that says, “I want this to exist” when the only reward that you would ever get is that this comes into existence. The result of your unshakeable clarity stands alone without any reasons or expectations attached. If someone asks you “Why are you doing this?” you would have no other explanation but that you wanted it to exist. They might push back and say, “But, why?”. The authentic answer would be: “No reason.”

       

      If you have had this experience before, you know that such unreasonable Rage burns right through your emotional fears of not being good enough, or fears of making a mistake because you don’t know how it goes. Such Rage ignores your Gremlin strategies to play victim and get revenge. Such flaming Clarity is unhindered by the opinions and fears of other people. Their claim of ‘impossibility’ becomes irrelevant.

      When unleashing such resources, your efforts and energy are moved to create the particular results that would bring your Rage to its satisfaction. It can be intense. Your inner experience might be something like: “Things are like this, and I want them to be like that, but they aren’t like that, and it drives me mad enough to jump out of bed in the morning and do whatever it takes to make it how I want it to be!”

       

      When the thing comes into its own existence, it stands away from you and you are fulfilled, until the next layer of Outrage comes, which might only be a few moments later! It could be about writing The Book, or writing your next Article, delivering a WorkTalk, or a Workshop, making your next video, creating a Team of Edgeworkers or Intimacy Journeyers or Trainers, building a Gaian Gameworld such as a Bridge-House, or creating a codex for inhabiting a Nanonation, etc… Whatever it is you create, the engine behind your gestures is your outrageous Rage.

       

      For example, right now, I am using my outrageous Rage: that I want this article to exist in the world, to fuel my fingers bashing the keys. Only after this article is written, edited, proofread, published on Medium, posted on my website, Facebook and sent in my newsletter, will my Rage be satisfied. This Rage enlivens my commitment to write this article, as well as my integrity to my Archetypal Lineage which is providing this precious clarity.

       

      As a result, my collaborations with others create and harvest new possibilities to bring my article into existence. Taking a shower or washing the breakfast dishes supports my physical body to bring this article into existence. I go through my next Emotional Healing Process or Adulthood Initiation as the path of bringing this article into existence!

    • Untethering...

      A BLOG POST FROM MIKI KASHTAN

      https://www.facebook.com/MikiKashtan

      It was a Friday afternoon in 1995. I was going down the elevator in the Charles Schwab headquarters building (a major financial firm), after a day of work as a computer programmer, contracted through a small consulting agency. I was living with my beloved late sister Inbal in an apartment in Oakland, and this gig was part of my overall effort to work as little as possible and keep my consumption as low as possible. I was able to work 2-3 days a week while going to graduate school to study sociology.

      It was painful for me to sell myself, which I knew I was doing. In that pain and alienation, there was also satisfaction [for my Gremlin...] in imagining that no one in the office would know that I wanted to dismantle their business even while working within it...
      READ MORE

      'CULTIVATING REGENERATIVE LIVELIHOODS' IS A BRAND NEW COURSE STARTING 16 January 2023 FROM GAIA EDUCATION

      programmes.gaiaeducation.uk/regenerative_livelihoods

      COVID-19 has changed the way we work forever, we've seen a shift from rigid systems of office culture to a flexible, supportive culture where mental well-being is at the forefront of businesses and people's minds. 2021 saw the rise of 'the great resignation', a movement where millions of people left their soulless jobs in search of deeper meaning, connection and purpose in their lives. This was a powerful example of how attitudes are shifting as we enter into a new era.

      Course creators Della Duncan and Silvia DiBlasio have captured this shift and tailor-made a course that will allow you to delve deep and view your work and livelihoods from a new perspective, opening us to dream and explore new possibilities! This is our chance to continue the shift towards a more harmonious, equitable, just and sustainable future.

       

      Learn how to:

      • Articulate your passions, gifts, and purpose to inform your career plans.
      • Identify perceptions about work and economics that are not delivering you, others, and/or the planet well-being and health.
      • Develop a vision for your vocation, potentially incorporating multiple roles and activities, to demonstrate how you can contribute effectively to the challenges of our time.
      • Identify regenerative and cooperative economic theories, tools, and business models.
      • Communicate in writing and in speech who you are personally and professionally, as well as your vocation objectives.
      • Integrate the wisdom and skills developed through your Gaia Education learning journey with your livelihood path.
      •  Create or update your resume or CV in accordance with new and remembered insights from this course.
      •  How to contribute towards a more sustainable, equitable world through work.

    • Next Culture Doorways:

      Delivering what you ARE is your Archiarchal Service.

       

      "Here is how you can build yourself a next-culture future now."

      Here are examples of actual next-culture Bridge professions.

      Possibilitators are delivering their own Value as Archiarchy professional services and quitting their corporate jobs.

      They are moving into next culture now.

      And you?

      ALL of these ideas, artwork, distinctions, processes, and materials are ALL copyleft - they are NOT copyright!

      Please steal EVERYTHING. This is ALL open code thoughtware. (Welcome to Archiarchy!)

      Thousands more editions of each of these Bridges are needed in humanity's shift to Archiarchy.

      Plus, thousands of additional types of next-culture Bridge gameworlds need to be designed, built, and occupied now.

      What is your Archan profession?

      Are you ready to let it come out and shine?

      What are you waiting for?

    • R. Buckminster Fuller:

      We should do away with the absolutely specious notion that everybody has to earn a living. It is a fact today that one in ten thousand of us can make a technological breakthrough capable of supporting all the rest. The youth of today are absolutely right in recognizing this nonsense of earning a living. We keep inventing jobs because of this false idea that everybody has to be employed at some kind of drudgery because, according to Malthusian Darwinian theory he must justify his right to exist. So we have inspectors of inspectors and people making instruments for inspectors to inspect inspectors. The true business of people should be to go back to school and think about whatever it was they were thinking about before somebody came along and told them they had to earn a living.

      PATH OF EVOLUTION

    • Experiments To Try...

      Reading Experiments builds you different Matrix than doing Experiments. You need both kinds of Matrix. One without the other is insufficient. Thinking about doing Experiment does not change your Energetic Body, and you do not receive the Matrix into your Being. Thinking instead of doing can be hesitation due to fear. Sometimes the hesitation is intelligent, sometimes not. Removing unnecessary Energetic Blocks causing your hesitation can suddenly cause a vast increase in your intelligence. We call this: High Level Fun.

      DO NOT 'DO' YOUR JOB

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.20

      "I’m just doing my job."

      Did you ever say that before?

      Did you ever think these words to yourself about your life before?

      When you 'do' your job, what happens to your life? Does your job go away, to be replaced by tomorrow’s endless list of work to do?

      "I'm just doing my life..."

      But what if you were not?

      This Experiment is to replace the Memetic Construct you have built up in your mind around 'doing' - such as in: 'doing my job' or 'doing my life' - with an entirely different Memetic Construct.

      For the next 7 days, tell 3 different people each day: "I am just _________________ my job" (or 'my life'). Replace 'doing' with one of these substitutes:

      redecorating...

      taking Radical Responsibility for...

      reinventing...

      replacing myself in...

      transforming...

      making a television series of...

      (create your favorite, such as: re-wallpapering..., having a funeral for..., giving away..., pulling the rug out from under..., disillusioning..., recreating..., remarketing..., renegotiating...,)

      Remember, this is not a complaining session. This is not a victim conversation. There is no cynicism in your voice. This is StartOver time.

      After you make your statement, do not destroy the extraordinary Space that it creates. Instead, stay attentively THERE, with whomever you say this to. Take a stroll together in the new territory that just opened up. If you like that Space, figure out some way to 'hammer a stake' into the 'ground' so that you can find your way back there. Create a new Reminding Factor or a new Practice.

      This is how to create a powerful exciting moment in what you might usually regard as an ordinary Space. You call in unexpected creation forces that help you go sideways through a Nonlinear possibility Doorway into a new future for yourself and others.

      Painting Doorways is a natural set of talents that you can develop. You have the power to ongoingly re-contextualize your job, or your life, or your relationship, or your future, or your church, or...

      Nobody can do this for you. Nobody can stop you from doing it.

      After these seven days of creating new frameworks for yourself three times each day, please record Matrix Code YOURJOBx.20 at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points.

      REPLACE YOURSELF FROM YOUR JOB

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.18

      You can not leave a job if there is no one to replace you. If no one else can do your job it is not because you are special, it is because you did not replace yourself. You can replace yourself as soon as you start a job. Replace yourself now.

      How to replace yourself:

      1. Let go of being special. You have been holding on to what you know to prove that you are needed, that you are a good worker, and that you are successful. Drop it.
      2. Share everything you have discovered. Make it your prize for everyone to know all your tricks.
      3. Find someone to replace you. Train them on everything that you can do. Empower them to be even better than you. When you have replaced yourself, leave. Move on.

      With your next project or discovery, find someone to replace you from the very beginning. Instead of competing with your colleagues for the next project, invite them to join you. Do the work, then share what you have discovered. Tell them everything you know and reveal all of your secrets. Set them up so well, they can do your job.

      Do the Emotional Healing Processes that come when you let go of being special.

      Keep notes in your Beep Book! about how it goes for you. What can you not let go of? What do you have space for in your life when you are not the only one?

      Write an article on what you discover.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.18 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the proof section include a link to your article. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      BECOME A CONSCIOUS ZOOKEEPER

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.02

      People have Parts. You have Parts.

      Many different Parts. Many more Parts than you can probably imagine right now.
      Each Part had a valuable Purpose when it was born during a situation where your survival depended on having that Part.

      Your Parts are not bad, wrong, or stupid. But you miss the authentic adulthood initiatory process of bringing your Parts together under one roof: your Psychological Parts Zoo.


      In this case, you have Parts about money, work, time, 'responsibility', 'adulthood', and 'authority.' (These words have 'quotes' around them because the meanings we are taught in modern culture are all irresponsible and unconscious. Other meanings are possible. When you learn new meanings it changes your relationship to the world.)


      This Experiment is to get together with your Team and discover your Job Parts. Spend 20 minutes with each person. Help them identify and list all their Job Parts. Then, help them discover each Part's Purpose. Write it all down in their Beep! Book. Title the section: MY JOB PARTS. Include all their Parts and each Part's Purpose. Mostly the Purposes are unconscious Shadow World Survival Purposes. Write them all down. As the Revolutionary Juan Santos said, "You cannot change what you cannot face."


      Become the Zookeeper of and consciously care for your Parts now living in the Economic Creatures section of your Inner Zoo.

      For the next 7 days, introduce each of your Part Creatures in your Economic Section to one new person.
      Write and publish an Article about this Experiment and your results.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.02 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the proof section include a link to your article. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      3-3-3 YOURSELF

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.01

      Feel for 3 minutes- 3 times a week- for 3 months.

      Skip the hesitation this time.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.01 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      I CANNOT LEAVE MY JOB BECAUSE...

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.22

      Make a list of all the reasons you can not leave your job.

      Get with your Possibility Team, Men’s Circle, or S.P.A.R.K. Study Group, and share your biggest, most unsolvable reason for why you can not leave your job. Set a timer for 10 minutes. Ask your team for Possibilities on how you can solve your big problem. Say to your team “Please give me possibilities for how I can__________.” Listen and write down every idea they give you in your Beep! Book without interrupting, judging, or stopping the Bright Principle of Possibility from flowing into the space.

      Reread your list and notice the emotions that come up for you. Share with your team and write them in the back of your Beep! Book for an Emotional Healing Process. Bring special attention to the arguments and justifications you give for why none of these ideas will actually work.

      Your list of reasons is not actually keeping you at your job. Your arguments and justifications are a clue. Follow this clue. What do you discover? What is really behind your reasons? What is actually keeping you at your job?

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.22 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the proof section share your biggest reason and one thing you noticed. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      GET REAL ABOUT WHAT IS HAPPENING NOW IN THE WORLD

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.03

      The world works.

      You are working.

      You get up, go to work, have an hour of "free time" (maybe), make dinner, and get ready for work the next day.

      You are an excellent worker.

      Who is this really working for? You notice that things that work for you, may not work for your boss. The things that work for mega-corporations do not work for the frogs, the butterflies, or the packs of migrating animals.

      For this experiment, you will get real about what is going on in the world and find who this is working for.

      1. Open your favorite news source, look through each article, and scan for who the world is working for. Write it down in your Beep! Book.
      2. Keep this question with you for one whole day. Notice who it works for to have litter on the street, plastic bags at the supermarket, or cheap wages at restaurants. Bring your attention to these things, especially to the things you think could not possibly be working for anyone.
      3. At the end of the day write for 5 minutes in your Beep! Book about what is really going on in the world and who it is working for. Is the world working for you?

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.03 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.  

      BE THE BEST OFFICE MATE

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.21

      For one day you will do everything to be the best and look the best. Go all out. Buy a new tie or a new shirt. Do your hair the best, wear the best shoes, even get your nails done.

      Go to the office and show off. Make the best jokes, be the most entertaining, be the nice guy. Take in all the extra looks, receive compliments, and seek attention. Make sure that all your office mates know.

      As you go through this day, notice what happens.

      How much time do you spend scanning for attention?

      How does it feel to receive this kind of attention? Do you like it? What part of you?

      How long do the ‘good feelings’ last?

      How do you feel when you leave to go home?

      What pressure does this create for tomorrow?

      What kinds of connections did you have?

      When you get home from work, reflect on your day. Take out your Beep Book! and write for 5 minutes on what it felt like to focus your day on getting other people’s attention. Consider what it fed in you and what it starved. How do you do this in little ways every day?

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.21 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the proof section share the ways you do this every day. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      DISTINGUISH YOU FROM YOUR JOB REGARDING YOUR NONMATERIAL VALUE

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.08

      NOTE: ONLY read this Experiment while you are 'at work' and being paid by the company on 'company time'. If you are not at work RIGHT NOW, then DO NOT READ THIS EXPERIMENT.

      Do this Experiment on 'company time'. This means that you will use time for this Experiment that the 'company' is paying you for. This means that to do this Experiment you will be being a 'bad employee' and stealing 'company time' for yourself.

      Just by thinking about these proposals, you are probably already feeling some emotions. This is the beginning of the Experiment. Immediately NOW get out your Beep! Book and write down what you are scared about from even thinking about doing this. Be specific and clear exactly what you are scared about. Your fear has at least 3 layers. Go down the 3 layers. At EACH LAYER write on your list at the back of your Beep! Book titled MY EMOTIONAL HEALING PROCESSES TO DO, the sentence, "I feel scared to use my time for me because ___________." Be clear and specific. After you write down the EHPs from all 3 layers of fear, go do at least one of these EHPs NOW... yes, also on 'company time'. Please keep in mind that probably at least one of these EHPs will be about a Past Life Vow. This means the company is paying you to do an EHP.

      The fact that you can heal and evolve is one of your Nonmaterial Values. The fact that you can Cavitate Space and Hold Space and Navigate Space for an Emotional Healing Process for others is ALSO one of your Nonmaterial Values! The company is blessed with a valuable ally providing Nonmaterial Value for a valued member of its Team.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.08 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the proof section share the ways you do this every day. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      ENTER THE READILY AVAILABLE BUT NEWLY DISCOVERED EXPERIENTIAL SPACE OF NO LONGER BEING AN EMPLOYEE

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.08

      Open a fresh page in your Beep! Book and title it: I AM NOT AN EMPLOYEE. Below that write 3 strong clear sentences that define what an 'employee' is with an example that explains each distinction of what an employee is. After each sentence, write very clear examples of why and how you are NOT that.

      Then 3 times each day for the next 3 months, publicly behave or speak, or even dress in ways that a true 'employee' would not or could not do.

      It may take some time to feel Centered, Grounded, and Bubbled in your new identity as 'Archan' and not 'Employee'. In the meantime, you may need to 'fake it 'til you make it'. In other words, "If the wind don't blow, you gotta row." Meaning, you might need to do some Conscious Theater until the qualities beyond 'employeeism' become comfortable enough to call home, acting 'as if' you are an Archan. You may have so many grooves in your brain as thoughtware traces left over from being a 'zombie employee slave of a corporation run by psychopaths' which are so deep and habitual that thinking, perceiving, or feeling something outside of the groove can be nearly impossible at first. ( and ). Exploring the new Archan territory is a wild adventure. Let your Experiments feed and inspire you. You are an Experimenter (https://becomeanexperimenter.mystrikingly.com).

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.21 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the proof section share the ways you do this every day. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      DISCOVER A DAY IN THE LIFE OF AN ARCHAN

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.08

      In Archiarchy, 'money' is replaced by your Nonmaterial Value. In other words, in Archiarchy, you become money. Your 'Clients' are the recipients of your Nonmaterial Value services. One of the differences between an 'employee' and a human being in Archiarchy is that a human being's Nonmaterial Value evolves and is of interest to E.C.C.O. (Earth Coincidence Control Office https://ecco.mystrikingly.com). In comparison, in a company, your clients are determined by the material objects your company is trying to sell (for example, G5 telephone service, time at the resort or golf course, 'green' electricity, etc.) and the company's marketing department. Archan's don't do marketing. They do Legend Making (https://legendmaking.mystrikingly.com). Since you are the Nonmaterial Value and you are the medium of exchange - the money, and you are the Legend Maker, you have so much energy and power flowing through that a life reorientation is needed. It is a huge personal experience shift from having the self-image of being 'an employee' to having the self-image of being 'Nonmaterial Value Medium Of Exchange Legend Maker'.

      Open another fresh page in your Beep! Book and title a page: MY NEW LIFE. Below that write: 'I am Nonmaterial Value Medium Of Exchange Legend Maker'. Then keep writing. Write out your first imaginations about what a day or a week in the life of such a Being could be like. Yes, you do not yet know what it would be like, but you can imagine some incidents and accidents about what it could be like. Write down your imaginings as a short story, giving details of verbal and nonverbal interactions between this Archan and other Archans, and this Archan and creatures still lurking about in the dark underworlds of Patriarchal institutions and traditions. These are notes for your article (https://writeyourarticle.mystrikingly.com) titled, A DAY IN THE LIFE OF AN ARCHAN. Please type in the link to your published article as the Proof.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.21 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the proof section share the ways you do this every day. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      DETACH YOUR VALUE FROM MONEY

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.08

      When you believe that your value is reflected by money, you limit your availability to receive money by the beliefs about your value. In this experiment, practice detaching your value from money.

      For one week, check with every payment that you receive whether a story comes up of your value connected to the money amount: “Oh that’s only $x, they don't value me”, “Why don’t they pay me more, they don’t value me”, “Wow, look how great I am that I deserve this much money” etc. When you notice the story, immediately stop and shift by making a gap between the money coming in and the value that you have. Say out loud: “This is not real. The money I receive has nothing to do with my value.”

      Experiment with expressing gratitude for the money you receive, no matter how big or small the amount. As emotions come up while you do the experiment, note them in your Beep! Book and go through them with a spaceholder.

      NOTES: Your value as a breathing, living human Being has no real connection with money. When you connect your value with money you live in a fantasy world. By making a gap between the money and your value, you gain the Possibility to choose the monetary exchange for your nonmaterial value free from the limiting beliefs that you may have about your value.

      When you have followed through with this experiment for one entire week, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.08 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      DISTILL YOUR DESTINY

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.07

      Perhaps you have a Memetic Construct deep inside your Being that says. "I must go to work to have money to live."

      'Earning money to live' is not your Destiny; it is your Survival Strategy.

      It might change your life to learn to tell the difference between your Destiny and your Survival Strategy.

      You might not know this, but your Destiny is optional. You can choose or not choose your Destiny. Look around you... It is pretty obvious that most people these days choose to not live their Destiny, and stay in survival instead.

      Your Destiny is your Bright Principles. Each human being serves a set of 3 to 6 Bright Principles.

      Bright Principles are facets of raw consciousness that want to be expressed in the physical world. Raw consciousness cannot act without your mouth, hands, voice, and body. It needs you.

      You have a particular set of Bright Principles that want to manifest in the world. That is your Destiny. That could also be your job, if you Choose to accept it. You might have to change your Memetic Construct or your Thoughtware in the process.

      You can distill your Destiny in the privacy of your own home.

      This Experiment is to use your Team (Women's Circle, Possibility Team, Research Team, Men's Circle) to Hold Space for you (or perhaps you ALL) to Distill Your Destiny.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.07 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the proof write your 3 to 6 Bright Principles. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      GAIA IS READY TO HIRE YOU...NOW!

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.04

      GAIA IS HIRING is a worldwide movement for living awareness in collaboration with the planet. It is about creating a new culture based on the common good, liveliness, and sustainability, rather than exploitation, profit maximization, and infinite growth. A culture in which we human beings see ourselves as part of planet Earth, rather than rulers and owners.

      This Experiment is to participate in a GAIA IS HIRING, 2-day or 3-day event. Or go to a GAIA UNCONFERENCE. If nothing is listed on their calendar, please write to Patrizia Patz and request that she get an event together for everyone (calendar).

      If Patrizia's job is not to put together a Gaia is Hiring event, then guess whose job it is? Yours! Yes!


      It can be.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.04 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the proof section include the dates of the event. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      COMMIT BEFORE YOU KNOW HOW TO DO YOUR JOB

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.05

      Your job is your job. Nobody can do your job for you. Nobody knows how your job goes. And... the Universe conserves Know How but only gives it to the ones who have committed to do something before knowing how to do it.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.05 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the proof section include a link to your article. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      WATCH: 'NO SMALL JOBS'

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.06

      Get together with Your Team (Men's Circle, Possibility Team, Rage Club, Riftwalker's Club, etc.) and watch five (5) of the interviews at No Small Jobs Podcast.

      In your Beep! Book, write down questions and answers that arise in you.

      Afterward, talk in groups of 3 and then in the whole Team about the decisions you are facing right now.

      This Experiment is to support each other to actually do the next Big Experiment.

      When you're looking to change your career, listen to No Small Jobs and find out how everyone else found their passion.

      During the next weeks, talk specifically with five different people from different walks of life and find out whether their path to career happiness was straight or windy; through university or through life experience; fraught or simple. Notice how this helps you discover new careers, or feel reassured that you are involved in the right one.

      Website: https://www.nosmalljobspod.com.au

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.06 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the proof section 5 answers to your questions. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      BRING YOUR COOLNESS FACTOR INTO YOUR JOB

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.11

      This Experiment is to get together with your Team to find each other's Coolness Factor.


      List the Coolness Qualities precisely in each one's Beep! Book. After that, the Team works on each person's list to create 3 practical Experiments that they can do to actualize these qualities as real services to offer to other people as an exchange of Value.


      Then open up the Space where each person has the opportunity to Take A Stand for doing ALL of those Experiments before you meet again in the following week.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.11 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      WRITE AND PUBLISH ONE ARTICLE FOR EACH OF THE VALUES OF YOUR COOLNESS FACTOR

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.12

      Write and publish one article every 2 weeks, for a year.

      When you have followed through with this experiment for one entire year, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.12 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 6 Matrix Points.

      MAKE A WEBSITE OFFERING THE SERVICES OF YOUR COOLNESS FACTOR

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.13

      Your new website should Turn You ON! and it should scare your Box.

      If it turns you on, there will probably be other people who also get turned on. These are your new Clients.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.13 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      TAKE A STEP THAT PREPARES YOU TO JACK-IN TO YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.14

      Do you know how to prepare yourself to jack-in into your Archetypal Lineage so you can deliver your services to your village?

      ESCAPE THE PATRIARCHY THOUGHTWARE

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.10

      ESCAPE THE NEXT OF YOUR 8 PRISONS

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.09

       

      YOU ARE ALREADY READY FOR MORE THAN YOU THINK

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.15

      S.P.A.R.K. stands for 'Specific Practical Applications of Radical Knowledge'. Doing S.P.A.R.K. Experiments Builds Matrix in your Being to responsibly and ecstatically deliver your value.

      At the same time, you have already build enough Matrix to be in a Team and to be reading this Experiment, and what this Experiment is telling you is that you are already ready for more than your Self-Image allows. Your Team can explain this to you.

      This Experiment is to read SPARK179 'You are already ready for more than you think,' out loud together and do all of its Experiments together.

      Then the Team helps each person create a few words as a Title or 'Next Culture Job Name' to describe a new Self Image for each person, such as Possibilitator, Edgeworker, Riftwalker, Possibility Coach, Possibility Mediator, Possibility Psychologist, 3 Phase Healer, etc.

      Each person creates or finds a new piece of clothing to wear ongoingly that represents this new Self Image and Title. This thing that you wear is not jewelry. It is your license to practice.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.15 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      DELIVER YOUR VALUE SO MUCH AND EVERYWHERE UNTIL THE UNIVERSE CAN NOT HELP BUT PAY YOU BACK

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.16

      Build Your Circle.

      Give away your Value into Your Circle for no money. This is how you practice with invaluable Real-Time Feedback about what works and what does not work.

      When your calendar of appointments with your Clients is longer than your day, then open the chance to exchange value.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.16 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      BUILD A GAMEWORLD FOR DELIVERING YOUR VALUE

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.17

       

      KEEP REPLACING YOURSELF IN YOUR GAMEWORLD POSITIONS

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.18

      The minute you start your Gameworld, find someone to replace yourself. Replace yourself before you know how to do it so you can train someone before you forget how you learned what you know.

      The first people you will attract to your Gameworld are Gameworld Builders, Spaceholders,

      LIGHTEN-UP YOUR LIFE SO E.C.C.O. CAN MOVE YOU TO YOUR NEXT JOB

      Matrix Code YOURJOBx.19

      E.C.C.O. stands for 'Earth Coincidence Control Office'.

      These are the folks who influence probabilities so that you 'accidentally' end up at the right place at the right time to enter Doorways of amazing opportunity that you could never have arranged for yourself. But E.C.C.O. can not move you if you have too much mass, too much debt, too many possessions, too many dogs and cats, too many obligations to your parents, etc.


      This Experiment is to get together with your Team and list into each one's Beep! Book all the items and agreements that require your time, energy, money, attention, love, etc. A hint is to think about leaving right NOW! Imagine yourself walking out the door (you could also pack your bags) and never return. What would happen? Would your cat die? Would you get fined hundreds of dollars for letting your lawn go brown?

      Look at your list. How much mass do you have? Could E.C.C.O move you without hammering you with a terminal illness or massive debt?

      Decide with your team if you want to decrease the number of obligations you have weighing you down or change the specifics of your agreements with people or organizations.
      Then do it! Prune the tree of your obligations one-after-another as Transformational Matrix-Building Experiments.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code YOURJOBx.19 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the proof section list the things on your list you have decided to change. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

    • No true adult wants to be a consumer, worker bee, or tycoon, or a soldier in an imperial war, and none would go through these motions if there were other options at hand. The enlivened soul and wild nature are deadly to industrial growth economies - and vice versa.

      - Bill Plotkin

    • StartOver.xyz

      NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play, massively-multiplayer, online-and-offline, thoughtware-upgrade, matrix-building, personal-transformation, adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code YOURJOBx.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

      Cookie Use
      We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By accepting, you agree the use of cookies. Learn More

      ×
      What Are Cookies?

      Cookies are bits of information (memory files) stored in your browser by sites you visit. As is common practice with almost all websites, this site uses cookie to improve your experience by remembering your preferences and enable other cookie-based features (e.g. analytics).

      Our Cookies

      When you submit data through a form such as those found on contact pages or comment forms, cookies may be set to remember your user details for future correspondence.

      In order to provide you with a better experience and remember your preferences, we need to set cookies so that this information can be called whenever you interact with a page.

      Third-Party cookies

      In special cases, we also use cookies provided by trusted third parties like Google Analytics. Third party analytics are used to track and measure usage of this site so that we can continue to produce engaging content.

      How To Disable Cookies?

      Most browsers let you to refuse to accept cookies. See your browser Help or Tool for how to do this. Be aware that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of this and many other websites you visit. Therefore, it is recommended that you do not disable cookies.

      Cookie Use
      We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By continuing we assume you accept the use of cookies.
